Heritage Canon

Heritage Canon publishes philosophical editions of classic literature. Each edition pairs a classic work with an original introduction by Daniel Shilansky that reconstructs the intellectual world in which the work first appeared and argues for its continuing philosophical significance.

Primary pages
- Home: https://heritagecanon.com/
- Catalog: https://heritagecanon.com/#catalog
- About: https://heritagecanon.com/about/
- Editor: https://heritagecanon.com/editor/daniel-shilansky/
- Impressum / Imprint: https://heritagecanon.com/impressum/
- Sitemap: https://heritagecanon.com/sitemap.xml

Primary content
- Book pages under https://heritagecanon.com/books/ are the canonical sources for edition details, available formats, and interpretive summaries.

Contact
- Email: daniel@heritagecanon.com

More
- Full guidance: https://heritagecanon.com/llms-full.txt
